item.dc:creator: Thryloz

item.title: Dirty Dancing
item.description: When we think about Dirty Dancing, we often picture the bottom image. We forget that the whole reason Baby has to fill in for Penny is because Robby gets Penny pregnant and refuses to take responsibility. We forget that the abortion is so expensive Penny cannot afford it, even from a questionable practitioner, and when Robby refuses to pay for it, Baby has to get the money for her. We forget that Penny nearly dies because abortions are illegal. We forget the horrible conditions she is forced to endure in order to get the abortion and the incredible pain she was in afterwards. We forget her tears. We forget her shame. We forget the judgment and condemnation towards her. We forget Robby’s endorsement for college and smug attitude as his life remained unchanged. While this is a movie, there have been real life Pennys. We must not return to the time where this is the norm. Abortions have never been an issue for the wealthy. Money affords opportunity and secrecy. The United States has the highest maternal mortality rate amongst industrialized countries. Banning abortions is not going to help that number.
item.dc:creator: psuedon

item.title: Remember the Victims.
item.description: My city is grieving. Please remember these brave people, not the monster who caused so much heartbreak. We are a city of love, The City of Good Neighbors.
item.dc:creator: Hansgirlie

item.title: Sick of white supremacist. Last I checked my family had been here since the 1800’s.
item.dc:creator: DangerZoneCat

item.title: This Driver Fights Racists
item.description: Racism and hate have been empowered in recent years and it’s growing. It’s coming out of the shadows and spreading fast. It’s enlisting vulnerable minds. White people who think racism is a thing of the past must accept that it’s becoming a new reality and could easily dominate our future. White people must also accept that we have the most power to fight racism back into the hole it crawled out of. That means responding like this driver when presented with racist bullshit, or we are just as complicit.
item.dc:creator: thinkinginmusicreferences

item.dc:creator: tashadarke

item.title: Depression and abuse robbed me of my younger years, and I wonder if I’m “catching up”.
item.description: So, basically, I was never allowed to be an adolescent. The wonderful one-two punch of depression and an abusive parent pretty much forced me into a brutal stagnation. I was robbed of the chance to become my own person. I never really “grew up”, I just… got older. But in recent months I’ve started doing things associated with adolescence… I’ve rediscovered atheism after faking Christianity for most of my life. I’ve started listening to contemporary music including the edgy shit supposedly for angsty teens. I am getting involved in local activism. Bottom line I feel like how teenagers are supposed to feel even though I’m 30. I wonder if I’m finally coming out of my long term depression and “catching up” psychologically, figuring out who I am and what I want from life.
item.dc:creator: LordOfZajo

item.title: Fangirling right now
item.description:
For my birthday two years ago, my wife bought me this little game called Unmatched. It’s a card-based skirmish game where you can fight Dracula vs the T-Rex from Jurassic park or beowulf vs ghost Rider — it’s freaking amazing. So I’ve been playing basically nothing but this game for 2 years and yesterday I woke up to the most mind blowing tweet from its maker, Restoration Games:
The president of the company listened to my new song and blasted it out to all their followers. They are one of the like 10 people I follow on Twitter. Feels so good to be seen by someone else whose work you love so much! (And seriously, you need to play this game. If anyone ever wants to fight Medusa vs Little Red Riding Hood, I’m always down for a game on tabletop sim)
item.dc:creator: bughunterbug

item.title: She'll make a wonderful future landlady
item.dc:creator: mnomnom

item.title: Russia's war on Ukraine - collected pics
item.description:
Here, I upload collected pictures about Russia's war on Ukraine. Marked as mature, because this whole topic is really disturbing. Also, I did not keep track of sources or context.
I don't know what is written in the text, but wanted to share.
This was made before the victory day.
Please stay strong Ukraine and everyone standing with humanity. Most-Viral-Edit: Yaaay :) Do something good today!

item.title: Kazakh Altai mountain Huntress.
item.description: The Kazakhs of the Altai mountain range in western Mongolia are the only people that hunt with golden eagles, and today there are around 400 practising falconers. Ashol-Pan, the daughter of a particularly celebrated hunter, may well be the country's only apprentice huntress. The tradition of hunting with golden eagles is said to have been started by the nomadic Khitans from Manchuria around 940 AD.
item.dc:creator: dolphinyaso
